DEPT 1/JUDGE BENSON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY STEVEN ROSENTHAL PRESENT WITH PLTFS. DEFT DIMITERIA FLOURNOY PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLOURNOY, DIMITERIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 415 JONES #610, STAYED UNTIL JAN-07-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. ALL DEPOSITS FORFEITED TO PLTF. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
